name: Beans Greens
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fresh butterbeans (limas or blackeyed peas would work too)
1-2 fresh hot peppers, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pressure cooker, add the wine and enough water to cover.
2. Add the rinsed beans, bay leaves, and onions.
3. Bring the mixture to medium-high heat and do not cover.
4. Simmer until the beans are soft.
5. Prepare the greens by washing each leaf, removing the veins, stacking them flat, rolling tightly, and shredding.
6. Add the shredded greens and hot peppers to the pressure cooker and stir well.
7. Place the lid on the pressure cooker and bring it up to pressure.
8. Cook at pressure for about 3 minutes.
9. Turn off the heat and allow the pressure to release naturally.
10. Serve the beans and greens with your favorite vinegar, such as apple cider, balsamic, or rice.
